$description: MASSIF — identity tokens for the m1nd Human View 'massif' block-field view (gen-004). DTCG, function-named, prefix --mf-. Palette values are anchored VERBATIM to the m1nd design system (m1nd-ui/src/index.css) so the view cohabits Hall/LivingTree without reading as another product; extending is by luminance only (side faces = top darkened). NO identity inherited from ALMUS or prior generations — only the zero-dep build FORMAT is shared.

field.$description: The ground the block-field sits on — same porcelain as the app so massif cohabits the window.

mark.$description: Ink used for labels, counts, and — critically — the UNPAINTED PLINTH contour.

quiet.$description: ink-soft — secondary text AND the plinth edge-line [anchor:--ink-soft]

state.$description: One token per evidence state. Values reuse existing verdict/state tokens by semantics (the color already MEANS this) — never an invented hue.

bedrock.$description: sage — structural evidence present (test-exercised or grounded) [anchor:--verdict-act]. NOT 'proven'.

bedrock-edge.$description: sage darkened ~14% — bedrock cap-segment top edge

unproven.$description: ochre — used but no proof evidence (worth a second look) [anchor:--verdict-reverify]

overgrowth.$description: grey — orphan, zero incoming refs; the DOMINANT state (195/199) stays neutral so it never reads as alarm [anchor:--state-unverified] [modo:laboratorio]

erosion.$description: brick — CANDIDATE drift (manifest-violating edge origin); hatched, never flat-filled; the loudest state, correctly the rarest (0 in real data) [anchor:--state-failure]

unpainted.$description: The factory state — 'not yet scanned'. NOT a state color: porcelain-on-porcelain, read only by contour + the quarantined-violet accent. THE decision that separates 'reserved plot' from grey 'no-use'.

fill.$description: same porcelain as ground — the plinth top is empty, no tint [anchor:--porcelain]

accent.$description: iris — the quarantined violet; in the m1nd system this is LITERALLY and ONLY 'insufficient evidence / honest unknown', which is exactly unpainted's semantics [anchor:--iris]

accent-veil.$description: veil — faint violet wash for the plinth accent tick [anchor:--veil]

block.$description: Neutral prism geometry shading, used when a face carries a painted state (side faces are the top state token darkened) and for the pedestal contour system.

top-light.$description: porcelain lifted ~2% — top-face sheen on an unpainted plinth

side-a.$description: porcelain darkened ~4% — left side face of an empty plinth (volume by luminance) [card:tadao-ando]

side-b.$description: porcelain darkened ~8% — right side face of an empty plinth (deeper shadow) [card:tadao-ando]

focus.$description: The Ando focus-cut: selecting darkens the field (mass) so the piece is the only fully-legible region (aperture). Darkening, never emission — coheres with 'nothing glows'.

scrim.$description: ink at 55% — the mass that recedes so the aperture reads [card:tadao-ando]

shadow.$description: Matte contact shadows — assembled, not glowing. Anchored to the m1nd shadow tokens.

fontFamily.$description: Self-hosted design-system faces. Numbers are ALWAYS mono. Fraunces italic is the 'honest hedge voice'.

mono.$description: EVERY number — counts, proportions, proof_coverage, piece id

hedge.$description: the honest-uncertainty line, italic ('not yet scanned', 'candidate, not verdict')

plinth-edge.$description: the UNPAINTED PLINTH contour weight — thin, ink-soft, the sole reading of 'reserved plot'

cap-height.$description: STATE-STRATUM CAP band thickness on a container top face

cut.$description: Ando focus-cut: field darkens (ease-out). A transition, NOT a rite [card:tadao-ando]

breath.$description: PERSISTENCE GLINT tremor-breath period — matches the design system's sanctioned ambient animation exactly [anchor: tremor-breath]

breath-floor.$description: tremor-breath trough (±0.15 from 1.0) — the ONLY sanctioned oscillation, and only on a block whose state changed
